lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: My squad and I are to remain on this island as undercover operatives. I am collecting information on Awowogei and his policies.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Very well. Since the 10th squad were recalled from Ape Atoll, King Narnode has named me new Grand Tree Guardian.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: I believe I speak on behalf of everyone in the Stronghold when I say thank you for stopping Glough. Who knows what would've happened if you weren't there to foil his schemes.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: You found me. Excellent. I wasn't sure the order would get here.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Always good to see you again, [player name].

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: I guess you didn't travel far, but since it's you... Here's a little something extra as a tip.
